title: Set up credit burndown pricing
description: Charge customers for pre-purchased credits that burn down in real time as they consume usage.

steps.title: Set up customer
steps.description: Create a customer that you will subscribe to your pricing plan.

nodes.title: Create a customer
nodes.description: Create a customer to subscribe to the pricing plan.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

params.description: Customer for credit burndown billing blueprint
params.name: Credit Burndown Customer

steps.title: Create Pricing Plan
steps.description: Create a Pricing Plan and a meter to track usage events.

nodes.title: Create a Pricing Plan
nodes.description: Create a Pricing Plan to serve as the container for your credit burndown pricing components.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create a meter
nodes.description: Create a meter to track usage events reported to Stripe.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

steps.title: Add a rate card
steps.description: Configure and attach a rate card to define per-unit usage pricing that credits will offset.

nodes.title: Create a rate card
nodes.description: Create a rate card with monthly service intervals for usage-based billing.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create a metered item
nodes.description: Create a metered item to link the meter to a billable item.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Add rate to rate card
nodes.description: Add a flat per-unit rate to the rate card.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Attach rate card to Pricing Plan
nodes.description: Attach the rate card to the Pricing Plan.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

steps.title: Subscribe customer to Pricing Plan
steps.description: Create a checkout session to subscribe the customer to the Pricing Plan.

nodes.title: Set live version to latest
nodes.description: Activate the Pricing Plan so new subscriptions use it.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create checkout session
nodes.description: Create a checkout session to activate the Pricing Plan subscription.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Complete the checkout
nodes.description: Complete the hosted checkout page to complete the subscription flow.
nodes.review_prompt: Open the app and confirm the user-facing flow works as described.

nodes.title: Wait for servicing activated event
nodes.description: Wait for the pricing plan subscription to be activated for servicing.
nodes.review_prompt: Run the relevant Stripe CLI trigger or complete the upstream flow, then confirm the handler receives and verifies the expected event.

steps.title: Charge for credits and grant them
steps.description: Charge the customer for credits via an invoice, then grant credits to their balance.

nodes.title: Create a payment method
nodes.description: Create a card payment method to use for charging the credit purchase.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Attach payment method to customer
nodes.description: Attach the payment method to the customer so it can be used for invoices.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create an invoice for credits
nodes.description: Create an invoice to charge the customer for the credit purchase.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Add credit line item to invoice
nodes.description: Attach a $10.00 line item for the credit purchase to the invoice.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Finalize and pay the invoice
nodes.description: Finalize and charge the invoice using the customer's default payment method.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Grant credits
nodes.description: Grant $10.00 in credits to the customer after payment is collected.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.

nodes.title: Create credit balance alert
nodes.description: Create an alert to notify when the customer's credit balance reaches zero. Listen for the billing.alert.triggered webhook to restrict access, then repeat the invoice and credit grant steps to top up. When the balance is restored, Stripe fires billing.alert.recovered so you can restore access.
nodes.review_prompt: Confirm the implementation calls the intended Stripe API, reuses values needed by later steps, and handles API errors without exposing secrets.
